# `!directory`

**Category:** files

Manage a directory on the target — create, remove, or adjust attributes. Fails if the path is an existing regular file.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `path` | path | yes | Absolute path of the directory to manage. |
| `remove` | bool | no | Remove the directory if it exists. |
| `recurse` | bool | no | Apply attribute changes recursively into the directory contents. |
| `attributes` | map | no | File attributes: owner, group, mode. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !directory
  path: /srv/app/data
  recurse: true
  attributes:
    owner: app
    mode: '0o755'
```
